title: dictyocline griffithii var. pinnata
intro: Dictyocline griffithii var. pinnata, also known as Himalayan mint or Indian mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dictyocline griffithii var. pinnata include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Dictyocline griffithii var. pinnata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used as a fresh herb in cooking.
